category_sources: Official protobuf-go README describes protoc-gen-go as the Go code generator and protoc compiler plugin.
source_facts.description says this is Go support for Google's protocol buffers.
display_name_sources: Official protobuf-go README refers to the tool as protoc-gen-go.
docs_sources: Official Protocol Buffers Go generated code guide.
Official source repository README for protocolbuffers/protobuf-go.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/protocolbuffers/protobuf-go, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official protobuf-go README describes protoc-gen-go as a protoc compiler plugin for Go code generation.
source_facts.description identifies Go protocol buffer support.
